arts.ttl: Celtic team news vs Motherwell confirmed as fans debate Brendan Rodgers' starting XI picks
arts.sum: Celtic starting XI: SCHMEICHEL, RALSTON, CCV, SCALES, TAYLOR, MCGREGOR, ENGELS, BERNARDO, YANG, MAEDA, IDAH. Others were more optimistic and had their fingers crossed that the lineup would come good as one wrote: “Glad to see Yang get another chance,” and a second commented: “Nice to see Idah start.

arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo desperate for one thing as Celtic star targets scoring Rangers repeat
arts.sum: Paulo Bernardo felt like a Celtic player the minute he bulged the net against Rangers last season. Paulo Bernardo would love to score another Celtic vs Rangers goal

arts.ttl: Celtic 0 Motherwell 0 LIVE score and goal updates from the Premiership clash at Parkhead
arts.sum: Having dropped points against Dundee United, Brendan Rodgers' Hoops welcome the in-form Steelmen to Parkhead

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers fires Celtic warning to fringe duo after Dundee United flop
arts.sum: Luis Palma and Yang Hyun-jun have been challenged by Rodgers The Celtic manager made four changes to his side against the Tangerines and allowed squad players to come in and attempt to upset the apple cart.

arts.ttl: Jason Cundy in savage Celtic and Rangers swipe as shock jock claims rivals would make same EPL impact as BARNSLEY
arts.sum: The pundit has once again put the boot into the standard north of the border, this time belittling Glasgow's big two

arts.ttl: Celtic double injury boost as Brendan Rodgers expects pair back for Motherwell clash
arts.sum: Cameron Carter-Vickers and Auston Trusty are available But with Carter-Vickers now returning, the manager explained how rotation will be part of his plans for the rest of the campaign because the matches are coming thick and fast.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers perfect Celtic tonic with trio set to return as bug-hit squad recovers for Motherwell - squad revealed
arts.sum: The Hoops were missing a number of big names for the goalless draw at Dundee United last time out.

arts.ttl: “In talks with Celtic” – Club VP claims Celtic man has expressed transfer wish
arts.sum: SC Internacional are working on retaining Celtic’s Alexandro Bernabei, after signing him on loan from Brendan Rodgers’ side back in March. The left-back played 23 games for the Brazilian club, who have an option to make his stay permanent. On Friday, Internacional president Alessandro Barcellos revealed negotiations with Celtic. arts.ttl: Lennon Miller prepares for Celtic with a difference as Motherwell ace reveals why he couldn't celebrate last Parkhead draw
arts.sum: He missed the last trip to Celtic Park and had to tone down his celebrations after watching Jon Obita hit a late leveller.

arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo targets Rangers repeat after Celtic aim to make most of Parkhead festive first in 14 years
arts.sum: Parkhead boss is delighted his stars got to spend proper time with their families before turning their attention to Motherwell.
